phrases.cultural_note: Piazza Tasso is Sorrento's main square, named after the Renaissance poet Torquato Tasso who was born here.

responses.english: Straight along Corso Italia, it's the heart of the town.
responses.phonetic: SEM-preh DREET-toh per eel KOR-soh ee-TAH-lyah, eh eel KWOH-reh del PAH-eh-zeh.
responses.french: Sempre dritto per il Corso Italia, è il cuore del paese.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si compra il limoncello tipico di Sorrento?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see KOM-prah eel lee-mon-CHEL-loh TEE-pee-koh dee sor-REN-toh?
phrases.cultural_note: Sorrento's limoncello is made from local Femminello lemons — the rind is steeped in alcohol for weeks before bottling.

responses.english: On Via San Cesareo, many artisan shops.
responses.phonetic: een VEE-ah san cheh-ZAH-reh-oh, noo-meh-ROH-zeh bot-TEH-gheh ar-tee-JAH-neh.
responses.french: In Via San Cesareo, numerose botteghe artigiane.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to take the ferry to Capri
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si prende il traghetto per Capri?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see PREN-deh eel trah-GET-toh per KAH-pree?

responses.english: At Sorrento port, tickets at the ticket office.
responses.phonetic: al POR-toh dee sor-REN-toh, beel-YET-tee AL-lah beel-yet-teh-REE-ah.
responses.french: Al porto di Sorrento, biglietti alla biglietteria.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to see a view of Vesuvius from the old town
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si vede il Vesuvio dal centro storico?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see VEH-deh eel veh-ZOO-vyoh dal CHEN-troh STOH-ree-koh?

responses.english: From the Villa Comunale, the garden overlooking the gulf.
responses.phonetic: DAL-lah VEE-lah koh-moo-NAH-leh, eel jar-DEE-noh af-fat-CHAH-toh sool GOL-foh.
responses.french: Dalla Villa Comunale, il giardino affacciato sul golfo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to eat typical Sorrentine pasta
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si mangia la pasta tipica di Sorrento?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see MAN-jah lah PAS-tah TEE-pee-kah dee sor-REN-toh?

responses.english: At Il Buco or Ristorante Caruso, both excellent.
responses.phonetic: dah eel BOO-koh oh dah rees-toh-RAN-teh kah-ROO-soh, en-TRAM-bee et-chel-LEN-tee.
responses.french: Da Il Buco o da Ristorante Caruso, entrambi eccellenti.
